Name: Bank Zero Rules
Desc: A simple booklet with scores written by a certain Bank Zero employee. It details the rules of Bank Zero's point system.
Desc2: "For your rights and interests, please read in full and thoroughly, and do not leave any gaps for exploitation by the Bank Zero." Except for this sentence, the rest of the document is written in a neat and tidy handwriting. It is obvious that it has been carefully revised several times.
